title: LoopStorm DecisionResponse
description: Response sent from the engine to the shim after evaluating a tool call. See ADR-001.

run_id.description: Echo of the run_id from the request.

seq.description: Echo of the seq from the request.

decision.description: The enforcement decision. allow: call proceeds. deny: call blocked. cooldown: loop detected, pause. kill: run terminated. require_approval: held for human approval (v1.1).

rule_id.description: The ID of the policy rule that produced this decision, if applicable.

cooldown_ms.description: Milliseconds the shim should pause before allowing the agent to retry. Only meaningful when decision is 'cooldown'.

cooldown_message.description: Corrective context message to inject into the agent's context during cooldown. Only meaningful when decision is 'cooldown'.

approval_id.description: Identifier for the pending approval request. Only present when decision is 'require_approval'. The shim polls or subscribes for approval resolution.

approval_timeout_ms.description: Maximum time to wait for human approval before applying timeout_action. Only meaningful when decision is 'require_approval'.

approval_timeout_action.description: Action to take if approval times out. Only meaningful when decision is 'require_approval'.

budget_remaining.description: Current budget state after this decision. Provided for shim-side visibility.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the engine produced the decision.
